The Spokane Sorosis club will
meet Monday, February %, with
Mrs. w. A. Wiley at her home,
South 720 Cedar street.


The Nature Study club will meet
Tuesday at the club rooms of the
Palace store.


Tuesday afternoon Mrs. James
Bullivant will entertain the mem
bers of the North Side chapter OF
the All Saints guild at Washing
ton tea at her residence, 02527 Ste
venS street.


The progressive luncheon OF the
JonquiI club will be given Monday
afternoon instead of Tuesday, as
was formerly announced.


The ladies of the club will meet
at 1870 o'clock at the home of Mrs
Paul Snuff, DILL Hollis street
where the first course of the lunch
con will be served. Mrs. d. G. Law
renee will be hostess at the second
course of the luncheon at her home
21O1 Mallon avenue, while the third
course will be served by Mrs. w. j.
Burchett at the Burchett residence
on Maxwell avenue.

club meeting at library. Board
meeting at 1870 p. m. Club meeting
at 2 p. m. and program at $3.50 p. m.
Patriotic day. Address by Mrs.
